_comment: Unique tile definitions for Realm of Shadow. These are special one-of-a-kind map features that enrich the world with lore, landmarks, secrets, and interactive points of interest. Each tile can have a visible sprite or be invisible (discovered only by stepping on it). Used across overworld, dungeon, and town maps.

ancient_shrine.name: Ancient Shrine
ancient_shrine.description: A weathered stone shrine covered in moss. Faded runes glow faintly in the moonlight. Those who kneel here feel a warmth spread through their bones.
ancient_shrine.interact_text: You kneel before the ancient shrine. A golden light washes over the party, mending wounds.

moongate.name: Moongate
moongate.description: A shimmering ring of blue light hovers above the ground. The air crackles with energy. Where it leads, none can say.
moongate.interact_text: You step through the moongate. The world blurs and reforms around you.

moongate_dormant.name: Dormant Moongate
moongate_dormant.description: A circle of ancient stones lies in the grass. The air feels heavy here, as if the stones are waiting for something.
moongate_dormant.interact_text: The stones are cold and lifeless. Perhaps they will awaken when the moons align.

forgotten_grave.name: Forgotten Grave
forgotten_grave.description: A lone headstone leans crookedly in the earth. The inscription has been worn smooth by centuries of rain.
forgotten_grave.interact_text: You brush the dirt from the headstone and notice a loose stone at the base. Beneath it, something glints.

whispering_stones.name: Whispering Stones
whispering_stones.description: Three tall standing stones arranged in a triangle. When the wind blows through them, you can almost hear words.
whispering_stones.interact_text: The stones whisper: 'Seek the shadow beneath the mountain. The key lies where light cannot reach.'

fairy_ring.name: Fairy Ring
fairy_ring.description: A perfect circle of pale mushrooms grows in the grass. The air inside the ring shimmers faintly.
fairy_ring.interact_text: You step into the fairy ring. Tiny lights swirl around you and your senses sharpen.

ruined_tower.name: Ruined Tower
ruined_tower.description: The crumbling base of what was once a wizard's tower. Scorch marks blacken the remaining stones. Something terrible happened here.
ruined_tower.interact_text: As you approach the ruins, a spectral figure materialises from the shadows.

cursed_well.name: Cursed Well
cursed_well.description: A stone well with dark water. The rope has been cut. Scratching sounds echo from deep below.
cursed_well.interact_text: You peer into the well. A skeletal hand shoots from the water and claws at you!

hermit_camp.name: Hermit's Camp
hermit_camp.description: A crude lean-to shelter beside a smouldering fire. Animal bones hang from strings. Someone lives here, barely.
hermit_camp.interact_text: A wild-eyed old man peers at you from behind a tree. 'You seek the Shadow? Fool. But I can help... for a price.'

sunken_shipwreck.name: Sunken Shipwreck
sunken_shipwreck.description: The broken mast of a ship juts from the shallow water near shore. Barnacles coat the rotting wood.
sunken_shipwreck.interact_text: You wade out to the wreck and find a waterlogged chest wedged in the hull.

dragon_bones.name: Dragon Bones
dragon_bones.description: The bleached skeleton of an enormous dragon lies half-buried in the earth. Its skull alone is taller than a man.
dragon_bones.interact_text: The bones radiate a deep warmth. Carved into the dragon's skull is a single word: 'REMEMBER.'

war_memorial.name: War Memorial
war_memorial.description: A tall obelisk of black stone inscribed with hundreds of names. Wildflowers have been placed at its base recently.
war_memorial.interact_text: The memorial reads: 'To the fallen of the Shadowgate War. May the realm never forget their sacrifice. Year 847.'

enchanted_spring.name: Enchanted Spring
enchanted_spring.description: Crystal-clear water bubbles up from between mossy rocks. The water glows with a pale blue light.
enchanted_spring.interact_text: You drink from the enchanted spring. Magical energy flows through you, restoring your spent power.

bandit_cache.name: Bandit Cache
bandit_cache.description: Freshly disturbed earth beneath a distinctive lightning-struck oak. Someone has been burying things here.
bandit_cache.interact_text: You dig beneath the tree and unearth a leather satchel filled with stolen goods.

oracle_pool.name: Oracle's Pool
oracle_pool.description: A perfectly still pool of dark water in a forest clearing. Your reflection stares back, but its expression doesn't match yours.
oracle_pool.interact_text: Your reflection speaks: 'I see what you seek. The Realm of Shadow stirs. Three seals bind it. Break them... or don't.'

lava_vent.name: Lava Vent
lava_vent.description: A crack in the earth vents hot sulfurous steam. The rock around it is stained yellow and orange.
lava_vent.interact_text: Scalding steam erupts from the vent as you pass, burning exposed skin.

smuggler_tunnel.name: Smuggler's Tunnel
smuggler_tunnel.description: Behind a curtain of vines, a narrow tunnel leads into darkness. Boot prints in the mud suggest recent use.
smuggler_tunnel.interact_text: You push through the vines and enter the narrow tunnel. The air is damp and smells of salt.

wishing_fountain.name: Wishing Fountain
wishing_fountain.description: An ornate stone fountain in a town square. Coins glitter beneath the water's surface. The statue of a weeping maiden tops it.
wishing_fountain.interact_text: You toss a coin into the fountain and make a wish. The maiden's stone eyes seem to follow you.

shadow_mark.name: Shadow Mark
shadow_mark.description: The air is cold here. An oily black stain on the ground pulses like a heartbeat. This is a place the Shadow has touched.
shadow_mark.interact_text: The Shadow Mark burns at your touch. Dark tendrils writhe and a voice booms: 'You cannot stop what has begun.'

ancient_battlefield.name: Ancient Battlefield
ancient_battlefield.description: Rusted swords and broken shields litter the ground between bleached bones. The grass grows thicker here, fed by old blood.
ancient_battlefield.interact_text: Among the bones you find a tarnished shield bearing an unfamiliar crest, and a journal wrapped in oilcloth.

interact_data.message: The journal's last entry reads: 'The Shadow King's army came at dawn. We held the bridge for three days. We failed.'

glowing_mushrooms.name: Glowing Mushrooms
glowing_mushrooms.description: A cluster of bioluminescent mushrooms casts an eerie blue-green glow on the dungeon walls.
glowing_mushrooms.interact_text: You harvest the glowing fungi. Their light seeps into your skin, sharpening your vision in the dark.

blood_altar.name: Blood Altar
blood_altar.description: A stone slab stained dark with old blood. Candles of black wax flicker around it though no one is here to light them.
blood_altar.interact_text: The altar pulses with dark energy. A voice whispers: 'Offer your blood and receive power.'

collapsed_passage.name: Collapsed Passage
collapsed_passage.description: A cave-in has blocked this tunnel. Loose rubble shifts underfoot. With enough strength, it might be cleared.
collapsed_passage.interact_text: The rubble is too heavy to move by hand. A strong explosive or magic might clear the way.

crystal_formation.name: Crystal Formation
crystal_formation.description: Massive translucent crystals jut from the cave wall, humming with a low resonance you feel in your chest.
crystal_formation.interact_text: You press your palms against the crystal. Energy surges through you, raw and ancient.

merchant_wagon.name: Merchant's Wagon
merchant_wagon.description: An overturned wagon lies at the roadside, one wheel shattered. Crates of goods are scattered in the mud.
merchant_wagon.interact_text: Among the scattered goods you find supplies that are still usable. A trail of blood leads into the forest.

seal_of_binding.name: Seal of Binding
seal_of_binding.description: A massive stone disc embedded in the floor, carved with concentric rings of glowing glyphs. This is one of the three seals.
seal_of_binding.interact_text: The seal resonates as you approach. The glyphs flare bright, then dim. It is waiting for the key.

wandering_ghost.name: Wandering Ghost
wandering_ghost.description: A translucent figure drifts silently between the trees, forever walking a path only it can see.
wandering_ghost.interact_text: The ghost pauses and turns to face you. 'Have you seen my daughter? She was just here... she was just...' The figure fades.

old_campfire.name: Old Campfire
old_campfire.description: A ring of stones surrounds cold ashes. This was an adventurer's camp, perhaps not long ago.
old_campfire.interact_text: You rekindle the fire and rest for a while. The warmth soothes aching muscles.

signpost.name: Signpost
signpost.description: A weathered wooden signpost at a crossroads. The writing is faded but still legible.

poison_swamp.name: Poison Swamp
poison_swamp.description: Bubbles of noxious gas rise from murky green water. The stench is overpowering. Dead trees stand like skeletal sentries.
poison_swamp.interact_text: The swamp's fumes burn your lungs and the muck clings to your boots.

treasure_hoard.name: Hidden Treasure Hoard
treasure_hoard.description: Behind a loose stone in the wall, a narrow space is packed with gold and jewels.
treasure_hoard.interact_text: You pry the stone free and a cascade of coins spills out! This must be a dragon's forgotten stash.

_categories._comment: Reference for tile categories used above.
_categories.landmark: Visible points of interest — shrines, ruins, notable features
_categories.portal: Teleportation points — moongates, tunnels, magical doorways
_categories.secret: Hidden discoveries — buried caches, hidden rooms, invisible features
_categories.lore: World-building text — memorials, inscriptions, environmental storytelling
_categories.rest: Safe havens for healing and recovery
_categories.dungeon_feature: Special tiles found only in dungeons

_interact_types._comment: Reference for interaction types used above.
_interact_types.loot: Give items or gold to the party
_interact_types.trap: One-time damage with a saving throw
_interact_types.teleport: Move party to a new location
_interact_types.wish: Random beneficial effect for a gold cost
_interact_types.rest: Heal HP and MP, safe from encounters
_interact_types.obstacle: Blocked passage requiring specific items or abilities
